name: aes67-nmos-bridge-cpp
install: bash .cursor/setup-conan-profile.sh && conan install . --build=missing -s build_type=Release && cmake -S . -B build/Release -G Ninja -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE="$PWD/build/Release/generators/conan_toolchain.cmake" -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build/Release
